title: Get help to improve teaching, retention and career progression
body: "  We are no longer recruiting for this programme and applications have now closed.   What you can get  Transforming Teaching is delivered by experts from the Institute for Teaching and is tailored to the needs of your school, but typically includes:   an initial diagnostic to agree the support you need and a bespoke professional development curriculum addressing your school’s priorities bi-annual conference attendance bringing together head teachers and senior leaders responsible for teaching and learning to share best practice support and coaching from the Institute of Teaching faculty to guide leaders of teaching and learning through the change process fortnightly instructional coaching, working directly with teachers in the classroom to improve their practice fortnightly continuing professional development (CPD) sessions and ongoing bespoke training that supports the improvement and progress of selected staff   Who can apply  The programme is for schools that want to:   focus on improving the effectiveness and consistency of teaching and learning improve retention of teaching staff or recruitment prospects for teachers with leadership potential   The programme is for schools rated ‘requires improvement’ or ‘inadequate’ by Ofsted in the following areas:   Bradford Burnley Cannock Chase Coventry Dudley East Staffordshire Halton Kirlees Knowsley Liverpool Nuneaton and Bedworth Oldham Rochdale Salford Sandwell Sefton St. Helens Tameside Tamworth Telford and Wrekin Walsall Warrington Wirral Wolverhampton   To apply you must be:   a school leader or teacher able to demonstrate measurable action and improvement in teaching and learning, leadership effectiveness or teacher training and recruitment   When it’s available  Applications for this programme are now closed.  What it costs  Eligible schools should contact the Institute for Teaching. Programme costs depend on school type:   primary schools: £4000 secondary schools: £6000 all-through schools: £6000   Find out more  See the Institute for Teaching website for more information.  See what other teaching and leadership innovation funded programmes are available in your area.  "
